slides.heading: How to Build a Content Strategy
slides.description: Everything you need to know to create content that converts.

slides.heading: Step 1: Define Your Audience
slides.description: Know exactly who you're talking to. Create detailed personas covering demographics, pain points, and goals.

slides.heading: Step 2: Choose Your Platforms
slides.description: Go where your audience already is. Focus on 2-3 platforms rather than spreading thin across all of them.

slides.heading: Step 3: Create a Content Calendar
slides.description: Plan 2-4 weeks ahead. Batch your content creation to save time and maintain consistency.

slides.heading: Step 4: Measure and Iterate
slides.description: Track engagement, reach, and conversions. Double down on what works, drop what doesn't.

slides.heading: Ready to Get Started?
slides.description: Follow us for more actionable marketing tips every week.
